params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, Subject, ActivityDate, WhatId, What.Name FROM Event WHERE ActivityDate >= 2026-01-01 AND ActivityDate <= 2026-03-31 AND Subject LIKE '%Demo%' AND Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales' ORDER BY Owner.Name LIMIT 500
